assessment.note: He names a concrete next-level aspiration — owning a cross-org decision area — which signals strong growth direction and some continued investment.

new_queue.label: Cross-org decisions
new_queue.name: Cross-org decision area — which decisions do you want your name attached to?
new_queue.description: Turns his stated aspiration into a concrete picture of the scope and decisions he wants to own.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship need
new_queue.name: What kind of sponsorship would actually change the way your work lands here?
new_queue.description: Explores whether external backing is the missing ingredient without assuming it is.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked through, what would you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete next move and turns the growth conversation into an actionable commitment.
